source_title: Deloitte 2014 Global Impact Report - Performance table
notes: Historical official performance table with FY2012-FY2014 revenue, growth, and member-firm counts. The legacy Deloitte URL returns 404 after site migration; an accessible third-party archive of the official report is recorded.

Historical official performance table with FY2013-FY2015 revenue, growth, service, region, and member-firm counts. The legacy Deloitte URL returns 404 after site migration; an accessible third-party archive of the official report is recorded.

source_title: Deloitte 2017 Global Impact Report - Performance table
notes: Historical official performance table with FY2015-FY2017 revenue, growth, service, region, and workforce figures. The legacy Deloitte URL returns 404 after site migration; an accessible third-party archive of the official report is recorded.

source_title: Deloitte 2019 Global Impact Report - Performance metrics
notes: Historical official performance metrics with FY2017-FY2019 revenue, growth, service, region, and workforce figures. The legacy Deloitte URL returns 404 after site migration; an accessible third-party archive of the official report is recorded.

source_title: Deloitte 2021 Global Impact Report - Performance metrics
notes: Official performance metrics PDF with FY2019-FY2021 revenue, growth, service, region, and workforce figures.

source_title: Deloitte 2023 Global Impact Report - Performance metrics and reporting frameworks
notes: Official 46-page 2023 performance report. The migrated URL filename says 2022, but the downloaded document identifies itself as the 2023 Global Impact Report.

source_title: Performance metrics and reporting frameworks - Deloitte 2025 Global Impact Report
notes: Official 51-page performance report. FY2024 service-line data are restated under the business-unit structure introduced in 2024; monetary values are presented in US dollars.

source_title: Deloitte reports FY2025 revenue of US$70.5 billion
notes: Official FY2025 revenue announcement; also states more than 470,000 people and presence in more than 150 countries and territories.
